args: set -a && source .env && MYSQL_HOST=127.0.0.1 MYSQL_PORT=3311 MYSQL_USER="$DB_USERNAME" MYSQL_PASSWORD="$DB_PASSWORD" MYSQL_DATABASE="$DB_DATABASE" npx -y @liangshanli/mcp-server-mysql
set -a && source .env && HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=6380 PASSWORD="$REDIS_PASSWORD" npx -y @liangshanli/mcp-server-redis
